description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and tests a C++ project using GCC C++20 on Linux. The workflow should trigger on push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches, and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. It should run four jobs in parallel, each on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, with different combinations of STL usage and C++ standard enforcement: with STL and C++20, without STL and C++20, with STL and forced C++03, and without STL and forced C++03. Each job should check out the code, build the project using cmake and make, and run tests.
